world.description: Deadline: 15-May-2026 The World Food Programme is seeking partners to implement a multi-sector resilience and livelihoods project in Haiti’s Artibonite region. The initiative integrates food security, economic development, WASH, and peacebuilding to address poverty, social tensions, and climate-related vulnerabilities while promoting inclusive and sustainable growth. world.description: The ornate Cotofenesti helmet, which was stolen in January 2025 while on loan to a Dutch museum, was recovered last month.

world.title: Mexico to beef up security at tourist sites after shooting at pyramids
world.description: Mexico's government is boosting security at tourist sites in preparation for the World Cup after a man opened fire at the Teotihuacan pyramids.

business.title: "Just give us a shot:" Networks say community batteries can right the wrongs of grid gold plating
business.description: Should networks be allowed to deliver competitive services like shared storage from community batteries? Rob Amphlett Lewis explains how Ausgrid is "leaning in" to the transition and righting wrongs of the past.

business.title: Infosys, TechM: NIFTY IT slumps 1,200 points as HCLTech's Q4 & FY27 guidance dent sentiment; key details for investors
business.description: IT stocks: The NIFTY IT index tumbled as much as 1,228.35 points, or 3.87%, to hit the low of 30,500.75 against the previous close of 31,729.10. The biggest drag on the index was HCLTech (down 10%). Next on the losers' list were Infosys Limited (down nearly 4%).

business.title: AI-Driven Layoffs: Tech Giants Now Fire Humans to Pay for Machines
business.description: As tech giants pivot resources from human labor to AI infrastructure, Kenya’s outsourcing sector faces a crisis of stability and future relevance.

business.title: HCL Tech shares wipe out Rs 38,000 crore as target price falls to Rs 1,165. Why every second broker is busy downgrading
business.description: HCL Technologies share price plummeted nearly 10%, wiping out Rs 38,000 crore in market cap following a brutal Q4 earnings report. The IT major missed revenue, margin, and guidance targets, triggering widespread broker downgrades and price target cuts. Analysts are scrambling to reprice the stock amid concerns over client-specific headwinds and AI-driven deflation.

business.title: CBN Alerts Public On Fraudsters New Method To Steal from Bank Customers
business.description: CBN warns Nigerians about fraudulent messages, fake links, and cyber attacks aimed at stealing personal data and urges verification via official channels only.

business.title: US Stock Futures Rise, Oil Drops on Iran Optimism: Markets Wrap
business.description: (Bloomberg) -- US equity-index futures climbed and oil dropped after President Donald Trump said he would extend the ceasefire with Iran, spurring cautious optimism among investors.

business.title: Tron's Justin Sun sues Trump-linked World Liberty Financial over frozen assets
business.description: World Liberty unfairly froze Sun's $WLFI tokens and threatened him, the lawsuit alleged.

business.title: Gansu Liuhua Old Plant Facilities and Equipment Complete Demolition and Transfer - Global Public Solicitation to Revitalize State-Owned Assets
business.description: Lanzhou, Gansu, China, April 22, 2026 -- Gansu Liuhua (Group) Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as 'Liuhua Group') has recently been officially launched for global public solicitation. Qualified enterprises both domestic and international are invited to express their intentions, with the aim of preserving and enhancing the value of state-owned assets and promoting efficient resource-based disposal.

science.title: Did Life Exist On Mars? NASA's Curiosity Finds Organic Molecules Never Seen Before On Red Planet
science.description: The rover detected seven different organic compounds in a dried-up lakebed near Mars' equator, five of which had never been seen on the planet before.

science.title: Ancient DNA reveals a hidden Neanderthal group frozen in time
science.description: A remarkable genetic breakthrough has uncovered what may be one of the clearest snapshots yet of a Neanderthal “community” living together 100,000 years ago in what is now Poland. The findings reveal that these individuals shared genetic ties with Neanderthals spread across Europe and the Caucasus, hinting at widespread ancient lineages that later disappeared.

ai.title: Who is Emily Hart? How an Indian medical student fooled 'dumb' MAGA fans with AI
ai.description: To her millions of fans, she was a gun-loving, beer-drinking nurse who looked like Jennifer Lawrence and loved "Christ is King." But in reality, she was the creation of "Sam," a 22-year-old orthopaedic surgeon in training in India.

ai.title: Codex user base grows to 4 million; OpenAI says 1 million added in just 2 weeks
ai.description: OpenAI's coding assistant Codex now has over 4 million weekly developers, adding 1 million users in just two weeks. The company is now focusing on making Codex an enterprise-grade engineering platform. Enterprises are increasingly using Codex for various tasks. OpenAI is partnering with systems integrators to help companies adopt Codex for their workflows.

ai.title: 'MAGA Followers Are Super Dumb': Indian Medical Student Builds Fake AI Influencer Emily Hart To Lure Older US Men, Earns Thousands To Fund Education
ai.description: A 22-year-old Indian medical student created a fake AI-powered MAGA influencer and earned thousands monthly from US followers. Using tools like Gemini and Grok, he built a viral persona and monetised it via subscriptions and merchandise. Instagram later banned the account for fraud, while the student claimed he felt no remorse.
